name: ecommerce-gold
description: Gold-layer pre-aggregated tables of the ECommerPipeline e-commerce data platform (OLAP database ECommerPipeline_Olap). These are business-ready analytics tables refreshed by the ETL pipeline from the Silver star schema. All monetary values are in Vietnamese Dong (VND). Use these for sales analytics, top products, and customer lifetime value questions.

tables.name: DailySalesByCategory
tables.grain: One row per (date, product category). Pre-aggregated daily sales. Sum across rows to roll up to month/quarter/year or across categories.

columns.name: Date
columns.description: Calendar day of the sales. Filter or group by this for time-series.

columns.name: OrderCount
columns.description: Number of distinct orders that day in that category.

columns.name: ItemCount
columns.description: Number of order-line items that day in that category.

columns.name: TotalRevenue
columns.description: Total revenue (VND) that day in that category. Sum this for revenue questions.

columns.name: AvgOrderValue
columns.description: Average order value (VND) = TotalRevenue / OrderCount for that day+category.

columns.name: RefreshedAt
columns.description: When the ETL last refreshed this row (metadata, rarely queried).

tables.name: MonthlyTopProducts
tables.grain: One row per (year, month, product). Top 50 products per month ranked by revenue.

columns.name: TotalQuantity
columns.description: Units sold of this product that month.

columns.name: TotalRevenue
columns.description: Revenue (VND) of this product that month.

columns.name: RankInMonth
columns.description: Revenue rank within the month (1 = best seller). Filter RankInMonth <= N for top-N.

tables.name: CustomerLifetimeValue
tables.grain: One row per customer. Snapshot of lifetime spending + recency.

columns.name: FirstOrderDate
columns.description: Date of the customer's first order.

columns.name: LastOrderDate
columns.description: Date of the customer's most recent order.

columns.name: TotalRevenue
columns.description: Lifetime revenue (VND) from this customer. Sort DESC for highest-value customers.

columns.name: AvgOrderValue
columns.description: Average order value (VND) over the customer's lifetime.

columns.name: DaysSinceLastOrder
columns.description: Days between the last order and today. High = churned/at-risk.

tables.name: SalesByPaymentMethod
tables.grain: One row per payment method, reflecting CURRENT order state. Use for payment-method breakdown / paid-vs-gross revenue questions.

columns.name: OrderCount
columns.description: Total orders using this method (any payment status).

columns.name: PaidOrderCount
columns.description: Orders using this method that are fully Paid.

columns.name: TotalRevenue
columns.description: Gross revenue (VND) of all orders with this method.

columns.name: PaidRevenue
columns.description: Revenue (VND) of only the Paid orders with this method.

tables.name: OrderFunnel
tables.grain: One row per fulfilment stage with the current count of orders that reached it. Use for conversion-funnel questions.

columns.name: OrderCount
columns.description: Number of orders that reached this stage.

tables.name: ProductInventory
tables.grain: One row per product with current stock and lifetime units sold. Use for inventory / low-stock / turnover questions.

columns.name: UnitsSold
columns.description: Lifetime units sold (from the sales fact).

columns.name: LowStock
columns.description: 1 when CurrentStock is below the low-stock threshold.

fewShot.question: Tổng doanh thu năm 2026 là bao nhiêu?
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 SUM(TotalRevenue) AS TotalRevenue FROM gold.DailySalesByCategory WHERE YEAR([Date]) = 2026;

fewShot.question: Doanh thu theo category, sắp xếp giảm dần
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 Category, SUM(TotalRevenue) AS Revenue FROM gold.DailySalesByCategory GROUP BY Category ORDER BY Revenue DESC;

fewShot.question: Top 10 sản phẩm bán chạy nhất tháng 5 năm 2026
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 10 ProductName, TotalQuantity, TotalRevenue FROM gold.MonthlyTopProducts WHERE [Year] = 2026 AND [Month] = 5 AND RankInMonth <= 10 ORDER BY RankInMonth;

fewShot.question: Which customers have the highest lifetime value?
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 10 CustomerId, TotalOrders, TotalRevenue, AvgOrderValue FROM gold.CustomerLifetimeValue ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC;

fewShot.question: Có bao nhiêu khách hàng đã không mua hàng trong hơn 60 ngày?
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 COUNT(*) AS ChurnedCustomers FROM gold.CustomerLifetimeValue WHERE DaysSinceLastOrder > 60;

fewShot.question: Daily revenue trend for category Electronics
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 [Date], SUM(TotalRevenue) AS Revenue FROM gold.DailySalesByCategory WHERE Category = N'Electronics' GROUP BY [Date] ORDER BY [Date];

fewShot.question: Doanh thu theo phương thức thanh toán
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 MethodName, OrderCount, PaidRevenue, TotalRevenue FROM gold.SalesByPaymentMethod ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC;

fewShot.question: Những sản phẩm nào sắp hết hàng?
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 ProductName, Sku, CurrentStock, UnitsSold FROM gold.ProductInventory WHERE LowStock = 1 ORDER BY CurrentStock ASC;

fewShot.question: How many orders reached each fulfilment stage?
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 Stage, OrderCount FROM gold.OrderFunnel ORDER BY StageOrder;
